title: RESTORE - 211info
text: MEDFORD RESTORE RESTORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Sells donated new and reclaimed building materials, pre-owned furniture and appliances, and a variety of home improvement items. Proceeds from sales help build Habitat for Humanity homes for local low-income families. Accepts new and reclaimed building materials, furniture, and appliances in good working condition. 2233 S Pacific Highway Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday-Saturday 8am-5pm (541) 773-9095 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 773-9095 ReStore INTAKE PROCEDURE: ReStore: Walk in Donations: Curbside drop off, or visit website for more information or to schedule a pickup FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Saturday 9am-5pm Services: Appliance Donation Programs Building Materials/Supplies Donation Programs Donation Pickups Furniture/Home Furnishings Donation Programs Low Cost Building Materials/Supplies Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MEDFORD RESTORE
